'''Jaled Dur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Jaled Dur eventually attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Credited with crafting the priceless [[Heart of the Universe]], Master Dur's creation was a large gem imbued with the Force.<ref name="HU" />

At some point during his service to the Order, Master Dur took the [[Sunesi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Aqinos]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Instilling in him some forbidden beliefs about [[Droid/Legends|droids]], technology and the Force, Aqinos would go on to be a controversial Master in the Order himself.<ref name="DTF" />
